auth.resetSent: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.

overview.title: Overview
overview.noTransactionsDesc: Transactions will appear here once your accounts are synced.

category.title: Categories
category.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this category? Transactions assigned to it will become uncategorized.
category.duplicateError: A category with this name already exists

budget.title: Budgets
budget.pickIcon: Pick an icon for your budget
budget.noBudgetsDesc: Create your first budget above to start grouping categories.
budget.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this budget? Categories will be unassigned but not deleted.

account.title: Accounts
account.removeWarning: Are you sure you want to remove this institution? All associated accounts and transactions will be deleted.
account.noInstitutionsDesc: Add a financial institution to start syncing your accounts.
account.bankCredentialsSafe: Your bank credentials are securely handled by our banking partner and are never stored on our servers. We only receive your account balances and transaction data.

transaction.title: Transactions
transaction.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This cannot be undone.
transaction.bankSyncedNote: This is a bank-synced transaction. Only category and visibility can be changed.

csv.title: Import CSV
csv.uploadPrompt: Upload a CSV file exported from your bank.
csv.accountMatchNote: Account will be matched by name from the CSV. Rows with unrecognized account names will be skipped.
csv.minRows: CSV file must have at least 2 rows

profile.title: Profile
profile.purgeDescription: Permanently delete all your transactions, accounts, institutions, categories, budgets, and settings. Your user account will be kept but all data will be erased. This action cannot be undone.
profile.purgeFirstConfirm: This will permanently delete all your transactions, accounts, institutions, categories, budgets, and settings. Are you sure you want to continue?
profile.purgeFinalConfirm: This is your last chance. All your data will be permanently erased and cannot be recovered. Are you absolutely sure?
profile.purgeSuccess: All data has been purged successfully.
profile.tutorialDescription: Walk through the app setup guide, including category and budget configuration.

setting.title: Setting
setting.appearanceDesc: Choose how Money Tracker looks to you.
setting.switchToProDesc: Unlock bank sync, budgets, rules, tags, and full category management.
setting.switchToProConfirm: Switch to Pro Mode? This will unlock all features. Your existing data will be preserved. This change cannot be undone.

tag.title: Tags
tag.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? It will be removed from all transactions.
tag.noTagsDesc: Create tags to label and organize your transactions.

rule.title: Rules
rule.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
rule.noRulesDesc: Create rules to automatically categorize transactions based on their description.

tutorial.welcomeDesc: Let's get you set up in a few quick steps. We'll help you create categories, set up budgets, and link your bank accounts.
tutorial.skipAnytime: You can skip any step or quit the tutorial at any time.
tutorial.setupCategoriesDesc: Review the default categories below. Uncheck any you don't need, rename them, or add your own.
tutorial.setupBudgetsDesc: Set monthly spending limits for each category group. Leave the amount empty to skip a budget.
tutorial.noCategoriesForBudget: No categories found. Create categories first to set up budgets.
tutorial.linkAccountsDesc: Link your bank accounts to automatically import transactions, or add accounts manually if you prefer not to share credentials.
tutorial.addLater: You can always add accounts later from the Accounts page.
tutorial.setupSummary: Great job setting up your account. Here's a summary:
tutorial.noSetupSummary: You can set up categories, budgets, and link accounts anytime from the dashboard.
tutorial.modeTitle: How do you want to track?
tutorial.modeDescription: You can always switch to Pro mode later.
tutorial.modeProDesc: Link banks, set budgets, create rules.

data.importWarning: This will replace all existing data with the imported file. This cannot be undone. Continue?
data.dataManagementDesc: Export or import your financial data.

casualOverview.summaryDesc: See your income, expenses, and net savings at a glance.
casualOverview.monthDesc: Tap a month to see your financial data for that period.
casualOverview.addDesc: Tap the + button to quickly log an expense or income.
casualOverview.emojiDesc: Each circle shows a category. The ring shows its share of your total. Tap to see details.

casualAdd.dateDesc: Today's date is auto-filled. Tap the calendar icon to change it.
casualAdd.emojiDesc: Choose an emoji to categorize your transaction. Recent picks appear for quick access.
casualAdd.amountDesc: Just type the digits. The decimal is placed automatically.
casualAdd.noteDesc: Optionally describe what this was for. You can leave it blank.
